ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-25-2016 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Continued To Jun-07-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Plaintiff's and Defendant's counsel are each sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The jurisdiction of the arbitrator is extended through Jun-29-2016. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Jun-29-2016, at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2015 Continued To Mar-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Seeking Issue, Evidence And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

In re: DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO LLP'S Motion For Order Seeking Issue, Evidence And Monetary Sanctions - The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: The motion for monetary sanctions in the amount of $555.00 is GRANTED. Payment to be made within 14 days of notice of entry of order. The motion for issue and evidence sanctions is DENIED. The prevailing party is to prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Seeking Issue, Evidence And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-03-2015 Continued To Jun-16-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Request For Pruduction Of Documents, Set Two
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William K. Blakemore, Esq. of Donahue Davies LLP, Tel. 916.817.2900, for defendant and moving party, via Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: Defendant's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was discussed. After hearing, DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO LLP's Motion To Compel Response To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, is granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Sanford Kingsley; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
